notes: STATS + QUESTS pages, CAPTURE orb time, match-timer freeze. Two new menu buttons in the bottom nav: STATS (lifetime tracking + recent 10 matches), QUESTS (daily challenge + Steam achievements coming-soon card). HOME stripped to just the showcase. CAPTURE results tile now shows ORB TIME (mm:ss) instead of DEATHS so you see how long you held the pulse. Match timer no longer keeps counting through the results overlay fade-out. Sidebar no longer duplicates the version+alpha line (top-left brand chip already has it).
